title: Our Location | The Webb Schools | Private Boarding & Day School in CA
content:
Nestled in the lower slopes of the San Gabriel Mountains about 40 miles east of downtown Los Angeles.
Claremont is a vibrant college town where there's always something to do including lectures, concerts, museums and top restaurants.
Discover Claremont
75 Things to Do in Claremont
Claremont Events
Claremont Arts & Entertainment
Claremont Shopping & Dining
More Claremont Dining
Discover Claremont Itineraries
Spas & Salons
Claremont combines the charming atmosphere of a small, college town with the convenient proximity to major Southern California attractions and the Los Angeles International (51 miles from campus), Ontario International (20 minutes from campus), Bob Hope, and John Wayne airports.
Founded in 1887 and located along the old Route 66, Claremont is a thriving, environmentally conscious community known for its tree-lined streets, historic buildings, and world-renowned Claremont Colleges. Claremont is frequently listed as one of the best places to live in the United States.
List of 1 items.
Travel and Accommodations
To help with your travel plans, here are some recommendations.
AIRPORTS
Ontario International Airport (ONT) is the closest airport to Webb, located approximately 12 miles away. It is the most convenient airport to fly into and is served by most major airlines and car rental agencies.
Other airports in the Los Angeles area include :
Los Angeles International Airport (LAX) — 52.5 miles away
John Wayne Airport (SNA) — 41 miles away
Hollywood Burbank Airport (BUR) — 40 miles away
Long Beach Airport (LGB) — 49 miles away

The Olympic Spotlight Shines on L.A.
2/2/2026
Los Angeles’ vibrant energy and world-class spirit take center stage as we prepare to host the
2028 Summer Olympics
, bringing athletes and fans from across the globe to compete from July 14–30, 2028. From iconic venues to unforgettable moments, this celebration of sport and culture captures everything that makes L.A. exciting.
